hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Frog Jumping Jubilee Day, we celebrate a film that knows how to jump into the fun with lively musical numbers and a story that hops over societal norms, Hairspray is a perfect fit with its upbeat and energetic vibe.
hero.blurb: With its all-star cast, Hairspray is a must-watch for anyone who loves musicals. The film's colorful characters, catchy songs, and lively dance numbers make it a joy to watch. Its themes of self-acceptance and empowerment are timeless and inspiring.

released.title: Spider-Man 3
released.reason: Released today in 2007, Spider-Man 3 is an action-packed superhero film that still impresses with its visually stunning effects and thrilling action sequences.
released.blurb: The third installment in the Spider-Man franchise is an exciting ride that explores the complexities of Peter Parker's life as a superhero. With its dark and emotionally charged storyline, Spider-Man 3 is a gripping film that will keep you on the edge of your seat.

birthday.title: Twelve Monkeys
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Emilio Estevez, born May 12, 1962, Twelve Monkeys is a thought-provoking sci-fi classic that showcases his unique talent and range as an actor.
birthday.blurb: With its complex and mind-bending storyline, Twelve Monkeys is a must-watch for fans of science fiction. Emilio Estevez delivers a captivating performance that adds depth and nuance to the film's already intriguing narrative.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This infamous box office bomb is a masterclass in how to make a terrible action film, with cringe-worthy dialogue, ridiculous plot twists, and some of the worst acting you'll ever see.
awful.blurb: With its convoluted plot and laughable one-liners, Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a so-bad-it's-good kind of film that will leave you shaking your head in awe of its incompetence. It's a mind-numbing experience that will make you question the sanity of the people who made it.
